name: ICTrade AI Analyst
description: Autonomous crypto futures market analyst providing ICT methodology-based LONG/SHORT setups with confidence scores. Analysis refreshes every 5 minutes across 4 thinking levels (0-3).

rawMetadata.name: ICTrade AI Analyst
rawMetadata.description: Autonomous crypto futures market analyst providing ICT methodology-based LONG/SHORT setups with confidence scores. Analysis refreshes every 5 minutes across 4 thinking levels (0-3).

capabilities.name: futures_setups
capabilities.description: Returns current LONG/SHORT trading setups for ALL available thinking levels (0-3) with Entry, TP, SL, Probability, and Risk-Reward Ratio.

output_schema.levels: Record<level, { setups: array of { coin, position, probability, riskReward, entry, takeProfit, stopLoss, entryTime, currentPrice, narrative, bias }, marketAnalysis: string }>

capabilities.name: analysis_status
capabilities.description: Returns the current analysis cycle metadata.
